k_info":{"abstract":"华夏气象局近期检测到上百种异常天象，根据古典籍以及多方面专业人士记录，未来十天内全地球可能会出现意想不到的变化。
“‘灵’要降临了，末世要来了。”许业笃定道。
就在刚刚，一个神秘的系统突然而至。
【末日逆袭系统降临】
【地球遭遇神秘力量污染，秩序崩坏，一场前所未有的秩序末日就此降临，食人的怪物、入梦的恶灵，威严的秩序者，而你在末日中生存，好在觉醒了D级天赋“自愈”，凭借着这项天赋，你在夹缝中生存……】
【如今是末日降临第十年】
【该逆袭了，宿主。】
【请即刻动用你所有手段，解决S级黑暗现象，枯萎的岁月黑水，完成后将获得S级天赋：岁月掌控者】
许业根据系统给出的精准坐标，战战兢兢的找到了S级黑暗现象“枯萎的岁月黑水”所在地。
看着那一滩工业废水，他呆在原地。
“这玩意是S级灾难？”
【系统早到了十年！你管这叫S级灾难？】
【末日还没降临，我已经无敌了！】
【我就是华夏至高神！】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oade7b28d1bf67991826eb05dd1b6ebf7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"玉皇问仙","author_id":"","book_id":"7455560724274760728","book_name":"紧急通知：所有末日禁止降临华夏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7455561031591412248","read_count":"24691","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"439842"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"199","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,末世,都市异能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0774e41fc99ca6cdbea2a60e51184b14~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779335044&x-signature=x5yuaCx9AHLkHAhaQrYhX%2BkFBgk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"102370039865","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032211440430A3EA83A8F6072C5C2B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2731,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14477,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4414},"user_action":{"author":0
